{{Quote|You're about as much fun as a swampful of venom rats!|Wicket Wystri Warrick|<ref name="Ewoks5" />}}
A '''venom rat''' was a type of [[Poison/Legends|venomous]] [[Rat/Legends|rat]] that could be found in [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]].<ref name="Ewoks5" /> At some point no earlier than around [[8 BBY/Legends|8 BBY]],<ref name="Date">[[Ewoks (1985) 5|''Ewoks'' (1985) 5]] features [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]], who was born around [[8 BBY/Legends|8 BBY]] per {{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=222689&start=1905#14621041|thread=Books, Comics, & Television VIPs|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-04-20|time=11:42 AM}}</ref> the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] fled from the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] woodsmen [[Rok]] and [[Zol]] after discovering the alien's plot of cutting down the Ewok's [[Forest/Legends|forest]] on the<ref name="Ewoks5" /> [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] for processing. During the chase, Wicket stated that the two aliens were as fun as a swampful of venom rats.<ref name="Ewoks5" />

==Behind the scenes==
Venom rats were mentioned in the [[Ewoks (1985) 5|fifth issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Star Wars: Ewoks'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series. The issue was written by [[David Manak]] and published by [[Marvel Comics]]<ref name="Ewoks5" /> on [[October 1]], [[1985]].<ref name="Release">''[[Marvel Age]]'' 32</ref>
